_metadata.purpose: Keyword research matrix for security-bodyguard SEO build
_metadata.scope: 15 P1 cities x 5 service silos = 75 primary keyword clusters + supporting keywords + informational queries
_metadata.methodology: Query pattern analysis from competitor sites (GardaWorld, Global Guardian, AS Solution, Pinkerton, Control Risks), FCDO/State Dept risk data cross-referenced with search intent, and buyer behaviour research for corporate security directors and HNWI personal assistants.
_metadata.volume_estimates: Ranges based on niche characteristics. Security queries are LOW volume but VERY HIGH intent and value ($1K-15K per conversion). Volume categories: VL (<20/mo), L (20-100/mo), M (100-500/mo), H (500-2000/mo), VH (2000+/mo).
_metadata.live_tool_note: No Ahrefs/SEMrush access. Volume estimates are directional based on niche size, city population, expat/business traveller volume, and risk level. Gareth should validate top-50 keywords against Ahrefs when available.
_metadata.serp_context: Security queries typically show: (1) local security companies with Google Business profiles, (2) international firms like GardaWorld/Global Guardian, (3) travel advisory pages, (4) Quora/Reddit discussions, (5) news about security incidents. Very few well-optimised city-specific pages exist, creating a gap.

bodyguard_hire.target_buyer: Individual or PA searching for personal protection. Mix of corporate and HNWI.
bodyguard_hire.buying_stage: Mid-to-late funnel. Knows they need a bodyguard, searching for provider.
secondary_keyword_patterns: how much does a bodyguard cost in {city}

executive_protection.target_buyer: Corporate security director or travel risk manager. B2B buyer.
long_tail_patterns: executive protection for business travel to {city}

security_drivers.target_buyer: Corporate traveller or PA needing secure ground transport. High urgency.
security_drivers.buying_stage: Often late funnel. Trip is booked, need transport sorted.
long_tail_patterns: how much does a security driver cost in {city}

event_security.target_buyer: Event organiser, conference planner, corporate events team.
event_security.buying_stage: Planning stage. Longer lead time than personal protection.
long_tail_patterns: how much does event security cost in {city}

residential_security.target_buyer: Expat, HNWI, or family office. Ongoing contract, not one-off.
residential_security.buying_stage: Research stage. Typically relocating or already resident and reassessing.

risk_assessments.purpose: Top-of-funnel capture. People researching city safety before trips. Converts to service enquiry.
risk_assessments.volume_note: MUCH higher volume than commercial queries. 'is Lagos safe' gets 10-50x the traffic of 'bodyguard hire Lagos'. These pages are the top-of-funnel lead magnets.

guides.purpose: Authority building + long-tail traffic. Security regulations, travel safety guides.

keyword_clusters._note: 75 primary clusters (15 cities x 5 silos). Each cluster contains the primary commercial keyword, estimated monthly volume, keyword difficulty assessment, SERP gap analysis, and recommended H1/title tag.

bodyguard_hire.serp_gap: HIGH. Few quality city-specific pages. GardaWorld has Nigeria page but not Lagos-specific. Local Nigerian security firms have poor SEO.
bodyguard_hire.title_tag: Bodyguard Hire Lagos | Vetted Close Protection Officers | [Brand]
faq_targets: How much does a bodyguard cost in Lagos?
Can bodyguards carry firearms in Nigeria?
Do I need a bodyguard in Lagos?
How to hire a trusted bodyguard in Lagos

executive_protection.serp_gap: HIGH. Corporate security directors searching this are underserved. Global Guardian has a Nigeria page but not city-level.
executive_protection.recommended_h1: Executive Protection Services in Lagos, Nigeria
executive_protection.title_tag: Executive Protection Lagos | Corporate Security Services | [Brand]
faq_targets: What does executive protection cost in Lagos?
How do I arrange executive protection for a business trip to Lagos?
What security level do executives need in Lagos?

security_drivers.serp_gap: VERY HIGH. Almost no quality pages for this specific query. Major opportunity.
security_drivers.title_tag: Security Driver Lagos | Armoured Vehicle Hire & Secure Transport | [Brand]
faq_targets: Do I need a security driver in Lagos?
How much does armoured car hire cost in Lagos?
Is it safe to use Uber in Lagos?

event_security.serp_gap: HIGH. Local event companies exist but international-quality event security for corporate/diplomatic events is underserved.

faq_targets: How much does event security cost in Lagos?
What security do I need for a conference in Lagos?

residential_security.serp_gap: MEDIUM. Some local security companies target this. Expat-focused content is the differentiator.

strategic_summary.informational_funnel_opportunity: The 'is {city} safe' query pattern generates 10-100x the volume of commercial queries. These pages are the primary traffic driver and lead magnet. Risk assessment pages should be the highest content priority after commercial city pages.
strategic_summary.language_opportunity: 10 of 15 P1 cities operate in non-English languages. English-language security content for these cities has virtually no competition. This is the core competitive advantage.
strategic_summary.regional_escalation_impact: April 2026 Middle East escalation has dramatically increased search demand for security services across UAE, Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Kuwait, and Israel. 'Is Dubai safe now' and 'Dubai missile threat' are surging. Time-sensitive opportunity.

quick_win_silos.1_security_drivers: Lowest competition across all cities. Carjacking/kidnapping fears drive search. Few quality pages exist anywhere.
quick_win_silos.2_bodyguard_hire: Direct buyer intent. English content gaps massive in non-English cities.
quick_win_silos.3_executive_protection: B2B buyer. Longer sales cycle but highest lifetime value. Corporate security directors searching in English regardless of city language.

content_priority_order: 1. Risk assessment pages (is {city} safe) — highest volume, top of funnel
2. Bodyguard hire city pages — direct commercial intent
3. Security driver city pages — lowest competition
4. Executive protection city pages — highest value per conversion
5. Residential security city pages — recurring revenue potential
6. Event security city pages — seasonal but high value
8. Security regulation guides — long-tail, high authority

_metadata.method: Live API queries for all 10 query pattern types across P1 cities
_metadata.purpose: Validates search demand and reveals exact user language for content optimization

dubai_dominance.observation: Dubai dominates security service autocomplete across ALL service types
evidence: close protection: Top 3 suggestions are 'jobs dubai', 'course in dubai', 'dubai'
private security: 'jobs in dubai', 'companies in dubai', 'dubai', 'business department abu dhabi'
event security: 'jobs in dubai', 'companies in dubai', 'course in dubai', 'license in dubai'
executive protection: 'jobs dubai' appears in base suggestions
security company dubai: Transguard, Amana, MAB, Sobha all branded in autocomplete
dubai_dominance.implication: Dubai is the most competitive P1 city but also highest demand. Content must be premium quality.

safety_query_volume.observation: Every P1 city has 8-10 rich autocomplete variants for 'is [city] safe', confirming massive informational demand.
safety_query_volume.iran_war_context: Dubai and Riyadh both show war-related safety queries ('safe from war', 'safe from Iran', 'safe right now') dominating autocomplete. This is an unprecedented, time-sensitive content opportunity.

women_safety_signal.observation: 6 of 15 P1 cities show women/female safety as a dominant autocomplete theme
women_safety_signal.implication: Content strategy should include female traveller safety sections on all city pages. Potential for dedicated 'female executive travel' content hub.

competitor_gap_confirmed.observation: No branded competitor appears in autocomplete for any P1 city bodyguard/EP query except Dubai (Transguard, Amana, MAB)
competitor_gap_confirmed.implication: Zero brand competition at city level outside Dubai. The space is wide open.

key_findings.bogota_confirmed_demand: hire bodyguard bogota appears directly in Google Autocomplete, confirming real commercial search demand for this city.
